title: Johannesburg Heritage Tour
description: Grade 11 learners visited the Apartheid Museum, Constitutional Hill, and the Hector Pieterson Memorial — deepening their understanding of South African history.

title: Polokwane Science Museum Visit
description: Science club and Physical Sciences learners explored interactive exhibits on chemistry, physics, and engineering at the Polokwane Science Museum.

title: Kruger National Park Eco-Trip
description: Life Sciences learners ventured into the Kruger National Park for a hands-on ecological study trip, observing wildlife in its natural habitat.

title: Cape Town Mathematics Olympiad Camp
description: Our top Mathematics learners attended an Olympiad preparation camp at the University of Cape Town, engaging with leading academics.

title: District Director: Annual School Inspection
description: The Vhembe District Director, accompanied by a team of subject advisors, conducted the annual quality assurance inspection and commended the school on its CAPS implementation.

title: MEC for Education School Visit
description: The Member of the Executive Council for Education in Limpopo visited Tshikhuthula Secondary to assess infrastructure and learner wellbeing programmes.

title: Subject Advisors: Mathematics & Science Support
description: A team of Vhembe District subject advisors delivered targeted support workshops for Mathematics and Physical Sciences educators ahead of the NSC examinations.

title: District Sport Coordinator Visit
description: The district sport coordinator visited to assess facilities and register learners for the inter-district athletics and soccer championships.

title: Dr. Matodzi — Resilience & Academic Success
description: Distinguished UCT alumni Dr. Matodzi delivered a powerful keynote on overcoming adversity, the value of education, and setting ambitious goals for the future.

title: Advocate Tshivhase — Law & Justice
description: Practising advocate Tshivhase inspired learners about careers in law, social justice, and the importance of reading and critical thinking.

title: Engineer Ramano — STEM Career Talk
description: Civil engineer Ramano, a Tshikhuthula alumnus, returned to inspire the next generation about careers in engineering and the built environment.

title: Youth Entrepreneurship Workshop
description: SEDA-Limpopo facilitators ran a full-day youth entrepreneurship and financial literacy workshop for matric learners preparing for life after school.

title: Heritage Day Celebration
description: Learners and staff dressed in their cultural attire to celebrate Heritage Day with traditional food, dancing, poetry, and the school's annual braai.

title: Sports Day & Inter-House Athletics
description: The annual inter-house athletics day saw houses compete in track and field events with a full day of fun, cheering, and celebration of school spirit.

title: Year-End Celebration & Fun Day
description: The school marked the end of the academic year with a fun-filled celebration featuring games, music, competitions, and a farewell to the Grade 12 class.

title: Chess & Mind Games Tournament
description: The chess club hosted an intra-school mind games tournament, drawing participation from over 60 learners across all grades in chess, draughts, and Scrabble.

title: Farewell to Mr Tshilinde (Retirement)
description: After 31 years of dedicated service as Head of Department for Mathematics, Mr Tshilinde was honoured in a touching farewell ceremony attended by staff, learners, SGB members, and family.

title: Transfer Farewell: Mrs Nemukula
description: Beloved English educator Mrs Nemukula was given a heartfelt farewell before her transfer to Vuwani Secondary School. Learners presented poems, songs, and a scrapbook of memories.

title: Retirement Honour: Ms Ravhuhali
description: After 28 years of shaping young minds in Physical Sciences, Ms Ravhuhali retired to a standing ovation. The school governing body presented her with a lifetime achievement recognition.

title: Transfer Farewell: Mr Munyai
description: Geography and Life Orientation educator Mr Munyai was celebrated before taking up a leadership role as Deputy Principal at Thohoyandou Secondary School.
